warps.notes: Staircase up to 3F at north area of floor
Staircase down back to 1F — landing point from 1F stair warp

notes: 2F is a pure traversal floor with no NPCs, trainers, or items.
The stair down at (10,2) returns to 1F; the stair up at (10,14) proceeds to 3F.
The floor features the tower's internal wooden beam architecture.
The Tin Tower uses a warp-based stair system — players step onto specific tiles to change floors.
No special events or scripted triggers on this floor.

access_requirements.to_enter: Rainbow Wing required (staircase on 1F only appears after Rainbow Wing obtained from Sage5).
access_requirements.note: No events, items, or NPCs on this floor. Pure traversal between 1F and 3F.

notes: Tin Tower 2F is a bare transitional floor with no scripts, no NPCs, no items, and no callbacks. It is 10x9 blocks (20x18 tiles). The ASM file contains only two warp events: warp_event (10,14) to TIN_TOWER_3F warp 1, and warp_event (10,2) to TIN_TOWER_1F warp 3. Players pass through this floor as part of the climb toward the roof.
